About Pernah Dekat

A shop for getting close again.

Pernah Dekat was born in Manyar, Surabaya as a cafe and kopitiam for focused work, warm tables, community gatherings, and late-night stories.

Open since August 10, 2024

A place for ideas, friends, and stories.

A lively work room

The 2nd floor indoor AC area supports study, laptop work, and small discussions.

A warm communal room

The 3rd floor smoking indoor area is made for longer conversations and easy coffee sessions.

A flexible event room

The 2nd and 3rd floors can host intimate community events, gatherings, watch parties, and workshops.

Jalan Raya Manyar No. 29, Surabaya, East Java 60284

Phone: 0822-8998-8224
